name: admin_activate_ai
summary: Seed prompts + enable DeepSeek on all org AI settings when key is present.

name: admin_consensus_test
summary: Dry-run coordinator against provided evidence (uses mock/real providers).

name: admin_list_data_scopes
summary: Platform catalog of max evidence fields the AI may receive (cannot exceed).

name: admin_set_data_scope
summary: Set data allowlist for a prompt (new version; cannot exceed catalog).

name: admin_create_prompt
summary: Create a new prompt version (optionally activate as default).

name: admin_update_prompt
summary: Modify the active prompt by creating a new version (immutable history).

name: admin_activate_prompt
summary: Set an existing version as the default active prompt.

name: run_renewals
summary: Cron-friendly: creates pending renewal payments when period ends.

name: put_billing_settings
summary: Set monthly list price in Naira. Yearly is auto-calculated as

name: resolve_client_manual_review
summary: Staff resolves pending manual company verification for an organization.

name: admin_list_frameworks
summary: Platform catalog for the admin portal. Includes seed + admin-uploaded frameworks.

name: admin_upload_framework
summary: Add a new framework to the **global** catalog (or update an existing one).

name: admin_upload_framework_file
summary: Multipart upload of the same JSON schema used by seed files.

name: admin_create_questionnaire_question
summary: Create a question curated by a GRC expert. Linked to one or more frameworks.

name: admin_update_questionnaire_question
summary: Edit prompt, frameworks, help text, etc. Marks the question as expert-managed.

name: admin_reload_seed_frameworks
summary: Re-import ``seed/frameworks/*.json`` into the platform DB. Does not delete admin uploads.

name: put_discovery_settings
summary: Configure the real Nmap binary and **admin-specified scanning flags**.

name: seed_experience_services
summary: Populate DB from code defaults once. After that, edit via admin API only.

name: put_experience_service
summary: Update modules, nav, widgets, onboarding for a service without code deploy.

name: server_overview
summary: Full operational picture of this API process and related workers:

name: put_alert_settings
summary: Configure **client** alert SMTP (separate from Phantix registration OTP SMTP).

name: app_auth_me
summary: Validate dual tokens and return tenant-safe identity.

name: resolve_service_key
summary: Validate pk_live_* service key; return company id/slug (no secrets).

name: upload_apk
summary: Accept an APK upload, store it on the platform, run static inventory analysis,

name: put_control_roles
summary: Assign dual-control by organization user ids (preferred).

name: get_pricing
summary: Example: monthly ₦1,000 → first month ₦500 (50% off), then ₦1,000/month.

name: create_assessment
summary: Run a merged assessment: questionnaire self-attestation + asset/scan posture.

name: connection_option_hints
summary: Document that connections need more than username/password.

name: list_drivers
summary: Show which DB engines have live-probe drivers installed vs optional.

name: provision_security_database
summary: Placeholder for optional Phantix-hosted dedicated security DB.

name: ai_engine_status
summary: AI Engine Phase 1–2: governance foundation + core agents.

name: create_assessment
summary: Run a merged assessment: questionnaire self-attestation + asset/scan posture.

name: create_org_user
summary: Create user. Bootstrap (pre dual-control) via company JWT; else initiator/authorizer session.

name: org_user_login
summary: Passwordless login for any registered organization user.

name: org_user_login_device
summary: Second factor when signing in from a new browser/device with an active session.

name: upload_organization_logo
summary: Store company logo used on report cover pages and footers.

name: update_my_preferred_services
summary: Change which services shape this org's product experience.

name: services_catalog
summary: Catalog from admin-editable experience configs (what preferred_services unlock).

name: cancel_job
summary: Cancel an active scan job for this organization.

name: yaml_scan_catalog
summary: Catalog of Nettacker-style YAML checks auto-discovered from scans/.

name: org_search
summary: Search Elasticsearch indices for this organization only.

name: subscribe_tool
summary: Paid tooling subscription (separate from platform membership).

name: decide_approval
summary: Only assigned initiator/authorizer with authenticator session may decide.

name: generate_plan
summary: Analyze org profile + asset inventory and return a recommended campaign plan.

name: health
summary: Cheap liveness for load balancers / orchestrators. Does not probe dependencies.

name: status_root
summary: Full operational status: DB, Redis, migrations, tools, engines, routes.
